messages:
{"parts":[{"content":"Daily position extraction from new B32s.

Execution:

Run extraction on B32s created in the last 24 hours:

python3 /home/workspace/N5/scripts/b32_position_extractor.py scan --since $(date -d "yesterday" +%Y-%m-%d)

Run tension scan on any new approved positions:

python3 /home/workspace/N5/scripts/tension_detector.py scan --limit 10

Log results to /home/workspace/N5/logs/position_extraction.log

Success Criteria:

New candidates appended to position_candidates.jsonl

Any tensions detected added to \_tensions.jsonl

No errors in execution

Output: Silent unless errors.
